title: Turquoise Journey!
description: Turquoise Journey! is a 1.20.1 Fabric Modpack centered around technology, with a bit of fantasy !
body:
![Turquoise Journey ! (icon)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d979bbfd4ed5af359bef6e47e1864d40dd93ffbc.png)

## Create impressive pieces of technology, explore a vast realist world, and embark on an epic adventure with Turquoise Journey !

_Turquoise Journey is a 1.20.1 Fabric modpack mainly focused around technology, with Create (& a few addons) being the core of the modpack, as well as building with mods such as Chipped or Rechiseled (and many more..)_


**⚠ Keep in mind that this modpack was made for a semi-private server, and that updates/support for other versions will probably not be made after the end of the season ⚠**

_Full mod list here :_
